ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign in the primary currency */,
  "budget_twd" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign in Taiwanese Dollars */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign (e.g., email, social media, search) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the performance record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the performance record */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, TWD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency to USD */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "impressions_target" REAL /* Target number of impressions */,
  "clicks_target" REAL /* Target number of clicks */,
  "content_views_target" REAL /* Target number of content views */,
  "searches_target" REAL /* Target number of searches */,
  "leads_target" REAL /* Target number of leads */,
  "adds_to_cart_target" REAL /* Target number of adds to cart */,
  "purchases_target" REAL /* Target number of purchases */,
  "conversion_value_target" REAL /* Target conversion value */,
  "target_click_through_rate" REAL /* Target click-through rate (CTR) */,
  "target_conversion_rate" REAL /* Target conversion rate */,
  "target_average_order_value" REAL /* Target average order value */,
  "target_bounced_visits_rate" REAL /* Target bounced visits rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_budget_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget adjustment */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the budget adjustment */,
  "new_budget" REAL /* New budget allocated for the campaign in the primary currency */,
  "new_budget_twd" REAL /* New budget allocated for the campaign in Taiwanese Dollars */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the budget adjustment */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the budget adjustment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the budget adjustment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the budget adjustment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_budget_adjustments_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_budget_adjustments_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
